title: Khajuresvara temple complex
tagline: Khajuresvara temple complex — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Khajuresvara temple complex is a group of deula-complex in Odisha (former Orissa state), India.
overview.description: Khajuresvara temple complex is a group of deula-complex in Odisha (former Orissa state), India. These Buddhist and Shaiva-Shakta temple complex is localed at Khajurasahi, Sergarh, Balasore. The Deula complex was built during 9-10th CE. There are several stone idols found to be placed in each of the deula. The largest deula, Khajuresvara, has been devastated.

topPlaces.name: Nilagiri
topPlaces.description: Nilagiri is a town and a Notified Area Council in Balasore district in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Gopinathpur, Baleswar
topPlaces.description: Gopinathpur is a village in Baleswar Sadar subdistrict in Baleswar District in the Indian state of Odisha. As of 2001 it had a population of 986 in 240 households.

topPlaces.name: Baneswara Temple, Balasore
topPlaces.description: Baneswara Temple is a Hindu temple in Balasore, Odisha, India. It is one of the oldest in the city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khajuresvara temple complex?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khajuresvara temple complex is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khajuresvara temple complex?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (169 km) and the nearest railway station is Jamshedpur (Tatanagar) (164 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khajuresvara temple complex?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khajuresvara temple complex at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khajuresvara temple complex?
faq.a: Stays in Khajuresvara temple complex start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khajuresvara temple complex?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nilagiri, Gopinathpur, Baleswar, Baneswara Temple, Balasore.
